subject: 🍽️ TEST: Dinner Plan with New Signature
body:
🍽️ Weekly Dinner Plan

Week of: Saturday, February 7, 2026

Budget Allocated: $200
Estimated Cost: $166
Remaining: $17.40
Sunday
Grilled Salmon with Asparagus
⏱️ 25 min | 🌍 Pacific Northwest American | 💰 ~$28 | ⚡ medium
📖 Salmon has been the lifeblood of Pacific Northwest indigenous peoples for thousands of years. Modern...
🎥 Watch on YouTube (12:45)
Ingredients needed: Atlantic salmon fillets, Fresh asparagus, Lemon, Olive oil, Garlic, Sea salt
Monday
Pork Tenderloin with Roasted Vegetables
⏱️ 45 min | 💰 ~$23 | ⚡ medium
Ingredients needed: Pork tenderloin, Brussels sprouts, Sweet potatoes, Dijon mustard, Fresh rosemary, Balsamic vinegar
Tuesday
Fish Tacos with Mango Salsa
⏱️ 30 min | 🌍 Mexican / Baja California | 💰 ~$26 | 🔰 easy
📖 Fish tacos originated in the coastal towns of Baja California, where local fishermen would cook thei...
🎥 Watch on YouTube (15:20)
Ingredients needed: White fish fillets, Corn tortillas, Mango, Red onion, Jalapeno, Cabbage slaw mix, Chipotle mayo
Wednesday
Chicken Tikka Masala
⏱️ 45 min | 🌍 Indian / British-Indian | 💰 ~$22 | ⚡ medium
📖 The origin of Chicken Tikka Masala is hotly debated! Many claim it was invented in Glasgow, Scotland...
🎥 Watch on YouTube (N/A)
Ingredients needed: Chicken thighs, Greek yogurt, Heavy cream, Basmati rice, Tikka masala sauce, Fresh ginger
Thursday
Beef Stir-Fry with Vegetables
⏱️ 20 min | 🌍 Chinese / Asian Fusion | 💰 ~$24 | 🔰 easy
📖 Stir-frying was developed in China as a way to cook small amounts of food quickly over high heat wit...
🎥 Watch on YouTube (12:30)
Ingredients needed: Flank steak, Broccoli florets, Bell peppers, Soy sauce, Sesame oil, Green onions
Friday
Shrimp Tacos with Cabbage Slaw
⏱️ 25 min | 💰 ~$25 | 🔰 easy
Ingredients needed: Large shrimp, Corn tortillas, Red cabbage, Avocado, Lime, Cilantro, Chipotle powder
Saturday
Vegetable Curry with Chickpeas
⏱️ 35 min | 💰 ~$18 | 🔰 easy
Ingredients needed: Chickpeas, Coconut milk, Spinach, Curry paste, Naan bread, Yellow onion

📋 How to Confirm or Make Changes

Reply to this email with any changes:

  • Swap a meal: "Swap Monday to Chicken Alfredo"
  • Remove a meal: "Remove Wednesday dinner"
  • Add a meal: "Add Sunday: Spaghetti Carbonara"
  • Confirm all: "Looks good!" or "Confirmed"

I'll automatically sync your changes to your Apple Calendar and update your HEB cart!

— Marvin Maverick
Alex's Assistant | Logistics Coordinator | Professional Overthinker


"Brain the size of a planet, and I'm asked to write an email."
